title: Create durable packets for AMP163 through AMP165
persona: Platform leader reviewing architecture, modernization, and FinOps decisions
steps: Open each AMP163-AMP165 workspace from the Assistant subnav.
Review live source signals, risks, recommendations, artifact, approval route, and rollback controls.
expected: Each workspace persists an AssistantAdvancedProgramPacket row with ampNumber 163, 164, or 165 and the correct programKey.
The packets have domain-specific source labels, risk rules, recommendations, approval owners, artifacts, and no-mutation scopes.
Architecture decision records, modernization roadmaps, migration waves, cloud budgets, commitments, tags, and finance reports are not mutated automatically.

title: Queue review for architecture, modernization, and FinOps packets
steps: Create or select a DRAFT packet.
Add a review note describing the downstream decision.
expected: The packet status changes to REVIEW_QUEUED and records actionQueueItemId, approvedByUserId, approvedAt, and approvalNote.
AssistantActionQueueItem uses an AMP-specific actionKind such as assistant_amp163_review, assistant_amp164_review, or assistant_amp165_review.
AssistantAuditEvent states that downstream records were not changed automatically.

title: Architecture, modernization, and FinOps guardrails remain explicit
steps: Open a packet with active risks.
Inspect recommendationJson, approvalPlanJson, artifactJson, and rollbackPlanJson.
Queue review without executing downstream changes.
expected: recommendationJson requires human approval before architecture, roadmap, budget, commitment, or tag changes.
approvalPlanJson identifies the relevant architecture, platform, finance, engineering, or FinOps owners.
rollbackPlanJson preserves source records and asks for a fresh packet when source evidence changes materially.
